basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 29 April 2026 on the official website https://www.iitm.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age Relaxation: Relaxable at the discretion of the Institute for SC/ST candidates.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: B.E./B.Tech. in ECE, EEE, Mechanical, Fibre Optics Engineering, or a related field. Strong understanding of fibre-optic sensing and/or Optical magnetometer principles. Hands-on experience in fibre, simulation, and testing of fibre or photonic components for sensor systems. Proficiency in optical simulation tools (e.g., COMSOL, ZEMAX). Exposure to signal conditioning, data acquisition, and noise characterization. Valid GATE score mandatory. Industrial Experience preferable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Junior Research Fellow post at IIT Madras is 19th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech. degree in ECE, EEE, Mechanical, Fibre Optics Engineering, or a related field, along with a valid GATE score. Practical experience is also highly valued.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow position is 32 years. Age relaxation may be provided for SC/ST candidates at the institute's discretion.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- along with 24% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by a test or interview, and finally, document verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any specific experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates are expected to have hands-on experience in fibre-optic sensing and/or optical magnetometer principles. Proficiency in optical simulation tools and industrial experience are considered preferable.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification is for IIT Madras, located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. While the job is based in Chennai, candidates from all eligible backgrounds are encouraged to apply online, provided they meet the qualification and experience criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the employment for this Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow at IIT Madras is on a contract basis. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are usually available on the IIT Madras website or the ICSR website. Direct links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article for your convenience.
